domain: Inuit igloo catenary compression dome — snow blocks spiraled into catenary arch distributing load via pure compression.
specific_mechanism: Spiral-leaned snow blocks form catenary curve; load propagates as pure compression through the curve; no tension or bending; uniform stress distribution.
llm_application: IGLOO-NORM: pre-compute catenary FLOP distribution across attention heads (highest at center, smoothly tapering at periphery via catenary curve y = a·cosh(x/a)); pre-normalize per-head weight scales accordingly so attention compute load follows the catenary profile by design. Static architectural load balance — no runtime router needed.
novelty_claim: LIBRA predicts MoE expert load dynamically. Block balances serving load. GQA/MQA reduce KV. IGLOO-NORM is static catenary pre-normalization — closer to architectural prior than to dynamic routing — but pre-normalization of head load is mainstream practice.
